info.title: DockMind API
info.description: DockMind is a lightweight daemon that manages the lifecycle of an AI inference server running on an external GPU.

get.summary: Get current system state and component health

200.description: Current system state and component health

post.summary: Power on the eGPU and start llama-swap

429.description: Cooldown active — power transition blocked by recent power cycle

post.summary: Stop llama-swap and power off the eGPU

429.description: Cooldown active — power transition blocked by recent power cycle

post.summary: Stop then start the complete system

429.description: Cooldown active — power transition blocked by recent power cycle

post.summary: Start an optional aux container by name

409.description: Conflict — power transition in progress, or system not in the Ready state (aux containers require the GPU to be detected and the inference backend healthy)

post.summary: Stop an optional aux container by name

409.description: Conflict — power transition in progress or state does not allow aux operations

post.summary: Reverse proxy to llama-swap chat completions (OpenAI-compatible)
post.description: Proxies the request to the backend AI inference server. Auto-starts the system if it is off. Returns 503 when the backend is unavailable.

503.description: Service unavailable: backend is off or unreachable. Includes Retry-After header.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the system may retry.

get.description: Returns cached model list when backend is unavailable. Serves stale cache with X-DockMind-Cached: true header.

X-DockMind-Cached.description: Present and set to 'true' when served from cache.

503.description: Model cache unavailable: no cached data and backend unreachable.

loadedModels.description: Models currently loaded in llama-swap, extracted from the /running endpoint. Empty array when no models are loaded or the service is unhealthy.

usedGpuMemory.description: GPU memory used by the process as reported by nvidia-smi (e.g. '12734 MiB' or 'N/A').

gpuProcesses.description: Compute processes currently using the GPU. Empty array when the GPU is absent or no processes are running.

total.description: Total GPU memory as reported by nvidia-smi (e.g. '16311 MiB').

used.description: Used GPU memory as reported by nvidia-smi (e.g. '12742 MiB').

free.description: Free GPU memory as reported by nvidia-smi (e.g. '3108 MiB').

utilization.description: GPU utilization as reported by nvidia-smi (e.g. '24 %'). Empty string when the GPU is absent or the probe fails.

gpuMemory.description: Overall GPU memory usage and utilization. Empty strings when the GPU is absent or the probe fails.

cooldownRemaining.description: Remaining cooldown in seconds. 0 when no cooldown is active.

idleRemaining.description: Remaining seconds before an idle auto-shutdown. 0 when the gateway is disabled, idleTimeout is 0, the state is not Ready, or a request is in flight.

auxContainers.description: Status of optional aux containers. Empty array when none are configured.

OpenAIError.description: Error response returned by the OpenAI-compatible gateway when the backend is unavailable.
